name: The Oaks Golf Course
about: The Oaks Golf Course is a full-service facility that offers both traditional outdoor golf and indoor simulator options. It operates with a membership-based model, providing various packages with benefits like a 21-day booking window and discounts on apparel. The venue features a main outdoor course, indoor golf simulators powered by TrackMan4 technology, a full restaurant and bar, a pro shop, and facilities for lessons, fittings, and events. The indoor simulators allow for golf during the off-season and can be used for casual play, practice, or group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan4 technology offers real-time swing and ball data for accurate practice
Flexible indoor/outdoor options allow for year-round golf regardless of weather
Multiple membership packages cater to different skill levels and budgets
On-site dining and pro shop provide a complete golf experience
Bay pricing accommodates groups up to four players, making it social and cost-effective

food_and_drink.notes: Oakleaf Restaurant and Bar serves a full menu of Wisconsin specialties
Full bar service available at the Oakleaf Restaurant and Bar

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar technology for swing and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs. The venue also offers club rentals and fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own restaurant and bar, the Oakleaf Restaurant and Bar, which serves food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes can vary, but bays are booked in one-hour increments, allowing flexibility for different group sizes and paces.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Oaks offers junior golf lessons and promotes a family-friendly atmosphere, making it suitable for children.
